title: SELECT DISTINCT not removing duplicates
poc: create table r(a1 string, a2 string);
SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN a1 > a2 THEN a2 ELSE a1 END as c1, CASE WHEN a1 < a2 THEN a2 ELSE a1 END as c2 FROM r;
SELECT CASE WHEN a1 > a2 THEN a2 ELSE a1 END as c1, CASE WHEN a1 < a2 THEN a2 ELSE a1 END as c2 FROM r GROUP BY c1,c2;
key_bug_features: SELECT DISTINCT not functioning as expected with duplicates
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id INT PRIMARY KEY, name STRING, value FLOAT);
SELECT DISTINCT name, value FROM test_table;
SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN value > 2.0 THEN name ELSE NULL END as filtered_name FROM test_table;
SELECT name, COUNT(*) FROM test_table GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
